pages.text: $(thing)Hiking Boots$() reduce slow movement from dense plants and brush, making overland travel through vegetation much easier.$(br2)Like Snow Shoes, they consume durability while actively negating slowdown.
First, forge $(thing)Metal Bracing$() on an anvil (wrought iron shown; steel also works).
Combine leather boots, leather, jute fiber, and metal bracing to craft Hiking Boots.
